column3:
Light beige/cream sheer fabric with beautiful cutwork embroidery highlighted with cutdana handwork along with beautiful thread embroidery Scalloping dupatta.

The fabric has Subtle natural shine, lightweight and flowy.

Opada silk plain bottoms

Same as base colour of the shirt
Crepe tissue dupatta with heavily thread embroiderer cutworm borders to enhance the look of the complete suit.

UNSTITCHED SUIT

Stepping into the season with a splash of fuchsia and a touch of tradition. ✨

There’s something about intricate embroidery and a classic silhouette that makes you feel instantly like royalty.

From the delicate paisley patterns to the ethereal glow of the evening, this look is all about celebrating grace. 🌸

VERY RICH AND ELEGANT CONCEPT
